YUNO_MOD_POWER_ZHI_CAN_POWER.title: Maim
YUNO_MOD_POWER_ZHI_CAN_POWER.description: Maimed creatures lose additional HP equal to their Maim stacks whenever they take damage.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_ZHI_CAN_POWER.smartDescri: Whenever damage is taken, lose an additional {Amount} HP.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_LIU_XUE_POWER.title: Bleed
YUNO_MOD_POWER_LIU_XUE_POWER.description: Bleeding creatures take damage equal to their Bleed stacks at the end of the player's turn, reducing Bleed by 1, and take damage equal to their Bleed stacks after attacking.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_LIU_XUE_POWER.smartDescri: At the end of the player's turn, take {Amount} damage and lose 1 Bleed. After attacking, take {Amount} damage.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_LOVE_POWER.title: Love
YUNO_MOD_POWER_LOVE_POWER.description: Max 10 stacks. At the end of your turn, gain Block equal to half your Love stacks. At 10 stacks, reset to 0 and gain 5 Block.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_LOVE_POWER.smartDescripti: At the end of your turn, gain {BlockGain:diff()} Block. At 10 stacks, consume them and gain 5 Block.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_DIARY_POWER.title: Diaries Held
YUNO_MOD_POWER_DIARY_POWER.description: Gain incremental bonuses based on the number of Diaries you hold.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_DIARY_POWER.smartDescript:
Currently holding {Amount} Diaries.
{Amount:cond:>=1?1: Gain {Amount} Block at combat start.
|}{Amount:cond:>=2?2: Gain 1 Strength at combat start.
|}{Amount:cond:>=3?3: Gain 1 Dexterity at combat start.
|}{Amount:cond:>=5?5: Apply 1 Poison to ALL enemies at the start of your turn.
|}{Amount:cond:>=7?7: Draw 2 cards at combat start.
|}{Amount:cond:>=9?9: At the start of turn 2, add a Knowledgeable to your hand.
|}{Amount:cond:>=12?12: At the start of turn 3, add a Myriad Reincarnations to your hand.
|}
YUNO_MOD_POWER_CRAZY_POWER.title: Frenzy
YUNO_MOD_POWER_CRAZY_POWER.description: Deal double damage and take double damage. Expires at the start of your next turn.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_CRAZY_POWER.smartDescript: Deal double damage and take double damage. Expires at the start of your next turn.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_BAO_ZA_POWER.title: Bandage
YUNO_MOD_POWER_BAO_ZA_POWER.description: When a monster dies and no other monsters remain, heal HP equal to your Bandage stacks, then remove them.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_BAO_ZA_POWER.smartDescrip: When a monster dies and no other monsters remain, heal {Amount} HP.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_AXE_POWER.title: Axe
YUNO_MOD_POWER_AXE_POWER.description: Max 8 stacks. On stance exit, deal 8 damage to the highest HP enemy, repeated Axe times.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_AXE_POWER.smartDescriptio: Max 8 stacks. On stance exit, deal 8 damage to the highest HP enemy {Amount} times.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_SWORD_POWER.title: Sword
YUNO_MOD_POWER_DAGGER_POWER.title: Dagger
YUNO_MOD_POWER_DAGGER_POWER.description: Max 12 stacks. On stance exit, deal 4 damage to a random enemy, repeated Dagger times.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_DAGGER_POWER.smartDescrip: Max 12 stacks. On stance exit, deal 4 damage to a random enemy {Amount} times.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_GUN_POWER.title: Gun
YUNO_MOD_POWER_GUN_POWER.description: Max 6 stacks. On stance exit, deal 4 damage to ALL enemies, repeated Gun times.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_GUN_POWER.smartDescriptio: Max 6 stacks. On stance exit, deal 4 damage to ALL enemies {Amount} times.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_YU_ZHI_MENG_POWER.title: Prophetic Dream
YUNO_MOD_POWER_YU_ZHI_MENG_POWER.descrip: Cards drawn via Foresee cost 0 this turn.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_YU_ZHI_MENG_POWER.smartDe: Cards drawn via Foresee cost 0 this turn.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_ZHAN_HOU_BAO_ZA_POWER.des: When you take attack damage from an enemy, gain Bandage equal to 25% × stacks of the damage taken. When you take damage from yourself, gain Bandage equal to 100% × stacks of the damage taken.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_ZHAN_HOU_BAO_ZA_POWER.sma: When taking enemy attack damage, gain Bandage equal to 25% × stacks. When taking self-damage, gain Bandage equal to 100% × stacks.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_YI_YA_HUAN_YA_POWER.title: Tit for Tat
YUNO_MOD_POWER_YI_YA_HUAN_YA_POWER.descr: Enemies that damage you gain Revenge equal to your stacks. When you damage yourself, ALL enemies gain Revenge equal to your stacks. Revenge increases damage taken by 50%, and removes 1 stack after taking damage.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_YI_YA_HUAN_YA_POWER.smart: Enemies that damage you gain {Amount} Revenge. Damaging yourself gives ALL enemies {Amount} Revenge.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_XIA_YI_GE_JIU_SHI_NI_POWE: At the start of your turn, apply Maim equal to your stacks to ALL enemies and gain [Energy:energyIcons()].
At the start of your turn, apply {Amount} Maim to ALL enemies and gain [Energy:energyIcons()].
YUNO_MOD_POWER_ZHE_YI_CAN_XIAN_GEI_NI_PO: You are unaffected by Weak and Vulnerable.
You are unaffected by Weak and Vulnerable.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_WEI_XIE_POWER.title: Threat
YUNO_MOD_POWER_WEI_XIE_POWER.description: Attack damage taken is stored. At the end of your turn, take damage equal to the stored amount, then this power is removed.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_WEI_XIE_POWER.smartDescri: Stores attack damage taken. At the end of your turn, take equal damage and expire.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_DAMAGE_STORE_POWER.title: Damage Stored
YUNO_MOD_POWER_DAMAGE_STORE_POWER.descri: Removed at the end of your turn. Before removal, take damage equal to the stored amount.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_DAMAGE_STORE_POWER.smartD: At the end of your turn, take {Amount} damage and expire.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_XIAN_JI_POWER.title: Snare
YUNO_MOD_POWER_XIAN_JI_POWER.description: Whenever you draw a card, apply Bleed equal to your stacks to ALL enemies.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_XIAN_JI_POWER.smartDescri: Whenever you draw a card, apply {Amount} Bleed to ALL enemies.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_CUI_XUE_POWER.title: Blood Quench
YUNO_MOD_POWER_CUI_XUE_POWER.description: Your attacks apply an additional {Amount} Bleed.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_CUI_XUE_POWER.smartDescri: Your attacks apply an additional {Amount} Bleed.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_XUE_BAI_POWER.title: Blood Rot
YUNO_MOD_POWER_XUE_BAI_POWER.description: Whenever an enemy takes Bleed damage, gain Maim equal to your stacks.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_XUE_BAI_POWER.smartDescri: Whenever an enemy takes Bleed damage, gain {Amount} Maim.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_AI_YI_YI_CHU_POWER.title: Love Overflow
YUNO_MOD_POWER_KAN_PO_POWER.title: Insight
YUNO_MOD_POWER_KAN_PO_POWER.description: When you enter a Stance, gain Block equal to your stacks.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_KAN_PO_POWER.smartDescrip: When you enter a Stance, gain {Amount} Block.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_WU_YI_ZHONG_TING_POWER.de: When you enter a Stance, draw cards equal to your stacks.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_WU_YI_ZHONG_TING_POWER.sm: When you enter a Stance, draw {Amount} card(s).
YUNO_MOD_POWER_AN_ZHONG_GUAN_CHA_POWER.d: When you gain Love, draw cards equal to your stacks.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_AN_ZHONG_GUAN_CHA_POWER.s: When you gain Love, draw {Amount} card(s).
YUNO_MOD_POWER_NI_GEI_WO_XIAO_XIN_DIAN_P: Whenever an enemy gains 1 Strength, gain Strength equal to your stacks.
Whenever an enemy gains 1 Strength, gain {Amount} Strength.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_FU_CHOU_POWER.title: Revenge
YUNO_MOD_POWER_FU_CHOU_POWER.description: Damage taken by enemies with Revenge is increased by 50%. Lose 1 stack after taking damage.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_FU_CHOU_POWER.smartDescri: Damage taken is increased by 50%. Lose 1 stack after taking damage.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_YU_ZHI_POWER.title: Precognition
YUNO_MOD_POWER_YU_ZHI_POWER.description: Whenever you Foresee, ALL enemies gain Strength equal to your stacks, then lose twice that much Strength.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_YU_ZHI_POWER.smartDescrip: When you Foresee, ALL enemies gain {Amount} Strength, then lose {Amount}×2 Strength.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_JIAO_HUAN_POWER.title: Exchange
YUNO_MOD_POWER_JIAO_HUAN_POWER.descripti: At the end of your turn, swap your Strength and Dexterity.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_JIAO_HUAN_POWER.smartDesc: At the end of your turn, swap your Strength and Dexterity.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_SHOU_HU_POWER.title: Protection
YUNO_MOD_POWER_SHOU_HU_POWER.description: When you gain Love, deal damage to ALL enemies.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_SHOU_HU_POWER.smartDescri: When you gain Love, deal {Amount} damage to ALL enemies.
YUNO_MOD_POWER_YIN_GUO_LV_DA_DIAN_TANG_P: At the start of your turn, add Orbs to your draw pile.
At the start of your turn, add {Amount} Orb(s) to your draw pile.
